text: This is one of my oldest projects, I made it before graduating high school.

Game development was getting very popular and I have always wanted to modify and make my own games rather than just consume them. And the best way to learn something was to start making things, so I started making a
clone using the Unity Game Engine.
There were a lot of plans I had for this game including having B-side levels with funky remixed songs like
elements but I ended up getting burnt out from encountering many bugs from the Unity Engine, particularly when designing the UI and Camera Movement.
I ended up revisiting this game more recently, as a more experienced developer and it is currently WIP but already its architecture is a lot more modular and performant.
